race.description: Westside Hotel Bar And Bistro Maiden Plate
race.comment: MAGIC MERLIN (4) improving gelding who was met with solid support at his second race start, with a fast finishing fourth over 1400m at Tamworth. Heading in the right direction and can shed his Maiden tag over this trip from the awkward gate. MUIRISC (10) best showing in three career starts when she closed late to secure third over 1300m at Orange. Gives the impression she can run the mile and expect to see her a little closer to the speed. LAGOON (9) frustrating mare with a handy record over this course and distance. Three weeks between runs with a plugging sixth over 1600m at this track. Can hold a forward position from the gate and not to be underestimated. RECOGNITION (2) made rapid improvement in all three runs and looking for this trip and further now. Utilized the good draw when pushed forward for a tough third over 1300m at this track. Likely to go back and be ridden for luck.
